title: ICT Quality assurance tester
description:
Role Overview

The Quality Specialist is responsible for conducting quality transaction monitoring across SMB programs for internal stakeholders and external vendors in the APAC region. This role delivers high-level market and quality insights in close collaboration with Call Center Quality Managers and Experience Program Managers to drive continuous improvement.

The ideal candidate has experience across both Customer Service and Sales environments and demonstrates a strong understanding of APAC market nuances relevant to the supported market. Success in this role requires strong critical-thinking and problem-solving skills, as well as the ability to thrive in a fast-paced, evolving environment.

Key Responsibilities

  • Perform audits on recorded client interactions and provide evaluation feedback through the Quality Management System (QMS)

  • Conduct regular 1:1 or group calibration sessions to ensure evaluation alignment with business requirements

  • Support the implementation and management of Quality Management standards and processes aligned with global frameworks and local market needs

  • Identify trends and potential risk areas, and proactively highlight insights to drive improvement

  • Maintain an accurate and up-to-date library of sample calls and chats

  • Deliver bi-weekly QA dashboards outlining audit completion, key findings, and quality trends to stakeholders

Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree preferred or equivalent practical experience

  • Minimum of 2 years’ quality auditing experience in a call center environment

  • Strong understanding of call center quality frameworks and methodologies

  • Excellent interpersonal and communication skills

  • Bilingual: fluent in English and at least one additional APAC language (spoken and written)

  • Self-motivated, adaptable, and comfortable working with ambiguity

  • Ability to perform effectively in a fast-paced environment

  • Strong attention to detail

Preferred Qualifications

  • Coaching experience

  • Knowledge of digital advertising

  • Experience conducting root cause analysis and issue drill-downs

    If you believe you fit the requirements for the role, please submit your application below or drop us an email directly quoting the job title.

    Due to an anticipated high volume of applicants, we regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified. The information provided is for recruitment purposes only.

    Know someone who would be a great fit for this role? Refer them to us and get rewarded.

postedCompany.description:
Cornerstone Global Partners is an Asia-centric recruitment solutions firm with a global reach through offices in China, Hong Kong, Singapore and the United States, along with network offices in 40 other countries around the globe. We provide services which include traditional C-level to mid-level executive search, contract staffing, market entry/ outbound investment consultancy and organizational design solutions through our industry-specialized recruiting team. 

Cornerstone’s leadership team is comprised of a diverse group of thought leaders in their respective industry practices. The team has demonstrated expertise in finding the right solutions for the unique challenges of the Asian market with the completion of over 1000 placements in the region. Cornerstone’s Partners and Consultants are industry-specialized and have a demonstrated track record of performance and success.
